reviews.review_text:
Lots of room for caravans
Cabins are very nice.

Picturesque park in a quiet part of Eden. Seems to be well run. |Unfortunately the cabin was not well stocked in kitchen utensils and bowls. |The kiosk was closed for renovations so all the reviews about coffees etc are not relevant. |It was a pleasant stay.

What a fantastic beautiful caravan park right across the road from Aslings Beach. Van sites are roomy we stayed in April quieter time of year but we were spread out . Amenities are great and they even have charging stations for electric vehicles. The park is dog friendly and has a dog wash beside the amenities  block.   Would not hesitate to recommend and hope to stay there again .
We came on a public holiday. Most had left the park , so it was peaceful. Cabin was clean, with everything we  needed. Very close to beach (short stroll)
Right opposite the beach for fishing plus the lake at the rear to teach the kids.  Very flat park with plenty of walking area..
Very clean park and facilities,  great walks, lake, beach. Friendly staff, and a free dog wash for yard mate 👍

Location - excellent. Amenities were very clean. Sites were nice and large. The service was great, even had a coffee van onsite. Value for money was very competitive with other parks in the area.  It was a nice quiet park with the beach right across the road and a lagoon  the back which gave amazing sunsets

From the moment we checked in we felt welcomed  and we loved the place. We had booked for two nights but we booked another night and if our schedule allowed we would have stayed a week. We would highly recommend this place and can't wait to get back there.

Busy park. Some small sites. A few larger.  Nice beach / lake location. Amenities poor and dated. Showers with gaps that means sharing other people’s dirty shower water. Very very off putting . Disappointed.

We stayed on a powered site for 4 nights park is in a fantastic location right across the road from the beach which is also a dog off leash beach which is great if you have a dog with you. Big park staff  friendly, the only down side was the ladies and mens toilets where not very clean every time l went to them they where dirty and that was all times of the day and night. In the whole 4 days there we never saw anyone cleaning them very disappointed with this as you are paying $50 a night and expect clean amenities and also $8 for the washing machines is a bit much.

I just wanted to share how much we enjoyed our recent stay at Reflections Eden Holiday Park. We stayed at the ensuite caravan site, The location was truly fantastic and the facilities exceeded our expectations, making our experience all the more memorable. The staff were lovely, Everything was well maintained and it made for a really relaxing getaway. I’ll definitely be recommending Reflections Eden Holiday Park to my family and friends. Thanks again for a wonderful stay!
Lovely clean , roomy deluxe cabin. Great location opposite the beach with a 20-30 min walk into town. Very friendly and helpful|Staff

This caravan park is the best option for a stop on the coast or for holidays. It has everything. The beach , bush tracks everywhere for runners, mountains bikes tracks…
The park’s grass is pristine, the staff is amazing and friendly.
I 100% recommend
Beautiful park with large green grassy catavan sites. Reception staff were excellent, especially Sharon. Fabulous location, doggy friendly, what more could you want. 5 stars out of 5.

Powered Van Site , Large site , clean amenities and a brilliant dog beach across the road , Dog friendly and access to a comfortable 6 Klms walk around the lake and a concrete walk into town ,
One of the best parks we have stayed at , (it wasn’t in the school holidays though)
Great holiday park in a great location. Popular. Lake access and beach across road. Dog friendly. Have stayed here numerous times  in our caravan.
Beautiful park to stay. Quiet. Close to the beach but sheltered. Great amenities. Super friendly and helpful staff. We'd stay again.
Big unpowered sites with view to the lagoon, 40$ 👍

Dieser Camping ist der Wahnsinn. Wunderschöne Stellplätze am Wasser, schöner Badestrand direkt über die Strasse, Spielplatz mit vielen Picknicktischen und sehr freundliches Personal. |Generell war es sehr ruhig und beschaulich. Wir hatten sehr schlechtes Wetter erwischt, es war kalt und windig und wir waren sehr froh, dass es eine grosse Campküche mit gedeckten Tischen hatte.
Awesome! Right across the street from a beautiful beach. 100% recommended!!!
Prime Location across from the Beach. Dog Friendly. Awesome. Management & Staff were super friendly. We will be back soon.

A pack of "undesirables" shall we call them, are staying here today - their inconsiderately loud tribal music reverberating throughout the whole park, along with endless shrieking and screaming. Completely disturbing the peace and unfortunately being allowed to do so.

Been coming here for the past 10 years! Have always had a spot next to the lake the reception is great with a tv room for guests and 2 amenities blocks a laundry and multibe camp kitchens. They also have powered sites,cabins , unpowed sites too. Location is excellent because it is right next to the beach and lake the skate park and playground is near. The park does have a kids playground too! Go karts for hire ice cream and more!
Family friendly park

Beautiful park in Eden, lovely big sites,  great location. Clean and tidy.  Had own ensuite which was great.  Dogs welcome which was a bonus.  Nice to be on the edge of the lake and over the road from the beach.

We had a very wet and windy stay at Reflections Eden which was unfortunate as the park had so much to offer including large and easily accessible sites. Our caravan slab was the best we have had in any park. ||Staff were friendly and very helpful during an uncomfortable first night that included many evacuations. Damaged and discarded items were quickly cleared away by the maintenance team and sms communication was great.||Amenities were clean with several camp kitchens/bbq’s available. Park also had a terrific and well fenced children’s playground.||We would have loved to kayak the lake and explore the beach but it was not to be on this visit.
Schöner Platz mit freundlicher Dame in der Anmeldung. Von See und Meer umgeben.

Staff were very helpful and friendly, and we stayed for one night. The ladies toilets were very clean, which we really appreciated.
It’s a short walk to the beach, which was a bonus. Our powered site was opposite the lake and had a beautiful view; however, unfortunately there was a very unpleasant smell coming from the lake.
One improvement we would have liked to see is greener grass, as it was very dry and created a lot of mess around the sites. That said, the caravan park definitely has great potential to be improved and turned into a hotspot destination.
Overall, we had a good experience and would definitely come back.
The park is so great that i would like to come back to it every month. Thanks to the owners they are so good at keeping the park safe and clean😊
Excellent coffee and extremely helpful and generous Staff special shoutout to Simon and the owner

Great spot for a stop over on our road trip staff offered easy late check in dog friendly cabin was super clean handy enclosed deck for dogs. Location fabulous, walking is easy and great from park & off lead area on beach next to Park. Sunset fabulous over the lagoon and you can hear the waves from the ocean as you sleep magic 👍🏻
Lovely peaceful and clean setting, well worth a stay. stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin.

The Staff are very friendly and the Caravan Park is beautiful but the reason for the 4 Stars is that we couldn't hook into the Park Water as the Town Water Pressure is too high and blows the Hot Water System Valve. It didn't blow when using the Caravan Pump. Lovely Park aside from the problem.

wunderschöner campimgplatz!
leider waren die frauen toiletten & duschen voll mit käfern und anderen fliegetieren 😵‍💫
Great spot
Sensational experience 👏 and ❤️ the location
Caravan sites were super big. Facilities were clean and location was great. Staff helpful.
Great Caravan Park, pet friendly, just across the road from a great beach and a food truck comes on Friday nights and makes great burgers and chips
Schöner, sauberer und ruhiger Campingplatz am Meer und See.
not flexible about rebookings and very hard to get a hold of on the phone.
Friendly staff, great location both on the lake and the beach. Cabins are spacious and kept clean. Great facilities with a dog wash station and a bike wash.
This is a great park, nice views of the lake,short walk to the beach, witch is good for kids. The staff were friendly and helpful. We will be back.

Our stay in one of the dog freindly cabins was fantastic. We had only a few nights booked on our journey but will definatly be back for a longer stay next time.|Everything we needed was there, plenty of walks and a leash free beach across the road primed for surf fishing, great locations and staff were very friendly, thanks for our accomodation|MJ and Kat

Lovely holiday park, well maintained and clean. Great location with beach and lake.  Various camp kitchens and amenities around the grounds for easy access. Playground next to main camp kitchen. Some ensuite sites. Bonus bike and boat washing station.
Great park, friendly & helpful staff 👏
Great location meters from the beach and short walk to town centre will definitely be back
位置优越，设施齐全

Great park in a beautiful location. Access to both beach and estuary are walkable. The boardwalk is perfect for bird spotting. Amenities were clean and accessible. Friendly and accommodating staff helped to make our stay memorable. Will be booking again!
Perfect location for everything
Toller Campingplatz zwischen Fluss und Meer. Wir waren hier für eine Nacht und wären auch gerne länger geblieben. Die Nacht mit Strom für 45 AUD. Traumhafter Spielplatz und Pedal Cards zum Ausleihen.

Very friendly and accommodating, we're able to fit our large motorhome and trailer on-site, they gave us an extra site free so as we didn't have to unhook. Clean shower and toilet block. Opposite a surf beach and backs onto a lake. Walking track out front along the foreshore. Great position, would highly recommend and will definitely be staying there again.
Update: We have returned and still as wonderful as the first time we came. They have a heater in the amnesties block which is great for taking the chill off on the cold mornings. One update is that they now have a charging station for those with an EV. There is a dump point and also a car and boat cleaning bay, there is also a dog bath at the amenities block, so if doggo gets all sandy and salty at the beach you can give them a bath when you get back.

What a wonderful place! Everything here is set up for a perfect holiday. The staff are friendly and always happy to help, the cabins are spotless, comfortable and well-equipped, and the park is kept beautifully clean. Best of all, it’s only about 50m from stunning Aslings Beach, so you can drift off to sleep with the sound of the ocean — absolutely magic. Eden itself is such a lovely town with great walks, cafes and views, and having the beach on your doorstep makes this park hard to beat. Highly recommend Reflections Eden for a relaxing and memorable stay!
A must stay for all travels. Beautiful caring respectful staff that go over and beyond to make your stay  as pleasant as possible. Loved the respect fullness of our furbabies they loved it

Powered site, an excellent location a short walk to the beach and a beautiful inlet you can walk through at low tide to see hermits. A communal herb garden for all to share outside the amenities. Ample shaded grassy seating areas. Visited Beowa National Park & Boyds Tower & was a great walk. Aslings Beach was resident to a giant python.

Twice requested  site near ammenities, once on booking by phone,  then on arrival. There were several vacant sites near them, but our site was approx 200 metres away. Very poor park lighting at night to the toilet block. ||Had to pay for 2 nights, even if only staying 1…. It is currently LOW season in Eden .||Most expensive park of 10 parks we stayed at this trip, with very few additional enticements.||Eden offers several other CP’s, so next visit will NOT be at Eden Reflections .
Beautiful spot 😊

A fantastic stay here. Well located at the beach and estuary, well organised, and good clean facilities.
This is an excellent base for exploring Eden and the surrounding towns, country and coast.
Eden itself is very interesting with history, a deep sea wharf and beautiful beaches. Excellent walks close to the holiday park.
Pambula and Merimbula not far away and really cool hinterland villages with plenty to see, do and taste. For example, try the estuary board at Merimbula and havr a cold beer at the Tafra pub and explore the wharf after. Of course theres the Bega cheese factory if your into that, but do yourself a favour and go find the local cheeses in the hinterland. A stunning coastline too living up to its 'Saphire coast' name. The dog will love the park and area also. Hope you enjoy.
The site we booked was amazing, so to was our stay from the time we arrived til the time we left. It will be hard to match. Hats off to all involved in making our stay so memorable
Friendly and helpful staff. Great location, best park around here for sure
Great place to stay situated on the lake and across the road from the ocean beach. Easy walk into town.

Reflections was great. Great facilities and excellent access to an ocean beach along with easy access to the more sedentary 'lake'. Dog friendly, always a plus. Great town, scenic foreshore and plenty of walks to match your ability. Happy to recommend 👍
Beautiful van park nestled between the lake and beach. Beautiful sunsets over the lake and a great dog-friendly beach. Not too far to walk or drive to town. Very dog friendly.
Gorgeous place to go with the caravan. Only thing that could be improved would be a heat lamp in the ensuite- otherwise perfect and amazing location.
Lovely location, nice walk to town centre, roomy sites for vans and motor homes, some slabs double.

Very friendly & helpful staff. Nice clean park. Ensuite site was great. Easy 15-20 min walk into town.
Highly recommended.

Such a beautiful spot to stay.  We stayed in a lovely cabin with an extremely comfortable bed, roomy bathroom with a great shower. Lulled to sleep by the sound of the waves every night !  Friendly welcoming staff and an added bonus was Friday night’s food van and drinkies !  Would definitely recommend and we’ll be back!

Staff were super friendly and helpful. Park and amenities were clean and well maintained. With the lake on one side and beach on the other you will not be disappointed. Perfect little oasis escape on the coast for a quick one night or longer stay.
Superbe  camping à quelques mètres de la plage, très bien équipé. Emplacement tentes, vans,  caravanes ....plancha à disposition pour in super rapport qualité-prix
Friendly service and excellent location. Hot water and water pressure was awesome (best shower ever had in caravan park). Dog friendly.
A lovely park in between the beach and inlet. Lots of green lawn and quiet in April. Tidy toilet block. Beautiful beach across the road, lots of walking area and dog friendly

Quel plaisir d’avoir passé une nuit en tente dans ce camping. L’accueil est chaleureux, bien que nous soyons arrivés un peu après l’heure de fermeture de la réception. Les espaces communs sont très bien entretenus, l’herbe est si moelleuse, les vues sur le lac sont apaisantes. C’était génial, n’hésitez pas allez-y !

Well the weather was very unkind when we stayed, so we were very pleased that we booked an ensuite slab site which was really lucky when we had so much rain.
Ensuite was a little tired but shower and water pressure were really good. Site had double slab was level and good size.
The park is in a beautiful location right on a lake and beach over the road, with beautiful walking trails close. Reception staff were very kind and helpful and made contact with us when our site was ready. We really appreciated that.
We had a food van in one night which was great too.
Would love to return in better weather. Eden is a beautiful place to visit.

We loved our stay. Perfect location lake one side and dog friendly beach the other. It was so lovely to stay in a very nice dog friendly cabin. The park is very neat and tidy. Our dogs loved the beach! Cabin was very clean and tidy. Highly recommended. Thank you reflections parks for providing nice accommodation for those that travel with their pets. Very reasonable price!

Really lovely park with lots of nice touches like dog wash, paper towel at the BBQs and herb garden.
Showers are maybe dated but great water pressure.

Had a one night stay at the Park.  Generally the park is well kept,  and the grassed power sites area is spacious.  The only downside are the amenities.  The door code lock is difficult to operate,  hard to see the numbers.  In the times that I spent going in and out,  every person had issues with the lock and were grateful that someone on the other side opened first.  The showers were clean but old.  Not sure about the gaps at the bottom of the separating walls of the shower,  I had finished my shower and was drying when the person next door started up and I was constantly getting wet from them.
Park in general is situated in a great location across from the beach and isn't far from the main town.  The staff were lovely and very helpful.

None powered camping sites were well positioned on the edge of the Holiday Park overlooking the beautiful lake and mountains. Also, it was well positioned not to close but not too far to the park toilets and shower and the parks shared communal kitchen was excellent and very convenient. The local shops, cafe and grocery store were a short walk away.  On the downside, the campsites were a little small.
Wir waren im Februar 2025 hier. Wir hatten eine Deluxe Cabin für zwei Gäste für 2 Tage. Das Häuschen ist in gutem Zustand und hat alles was man braucht. Ein insgesamt sehr gepflegter Park.
Very nice park and the managers are very helpful and welcoming
Great location between Aslings Beach and the lagoon. Large sites and good amenities. Would be very happy to stay here again.

Booked for 3 nights, but loved it so much we stayed for 4.
Beautiful spot, lake on one side of the park and ocean beach just across the road. Great facilities and excellent hosts. So many extra services including dog bath, car/boat/bike washing area, multiple clothes lines, kiddie quad bikes for hire, guest vegie and herb patch, organic eggs(when available) - even a foodie truck on Friday nights.

We stayed on unpowered site and the place is nice and all but last night I don’t know if it was an animal or a person was stealing our food in the eski but my dog caught it and was barking which woke me up and I heard the person/animal ran away and the eski was left open. Perhaps you can check the security camera? It happened around 1 am.

This is the second time we have stayed here as we loved it so much the first time. Great location with the beach on one side and the tidal creek/river on the other. Booked an ensuite site for 8 nights. Ensuite shower had a bit of a leak, but the staff are very friendly & provided us with extra towels and bath mats to help. Big & well maintained sites. Camp kitchen had all that we needed for meals. We love that this park is dog friendly, so we can bring our dog along. Will be coming back!

We stayed in our motor home n loved it. Across road from beach n on the lake.  Mabel was wonderful and gave us a perfect non crowded spot ( non powered) with views of the lake. Thank you Mabel for listening . Also right near the board walk around lake which we cycled around. Amenities were very clean. Used the cleaning bay to hose our motor home. Has everything u need. Only 2 kms from township, which we cycled. Highly recommend.

• Lots of space
• Clean toilets and showers
• Located between a lake and the beach
• Nice sound of the waves, with a beautiful beach just 1 minute walk away
• Drinking water available
• Very calm
• Close to the town
We stayed in a caravan so I can't rate the room however the ensuite was great. The staff were lovely and helpful. The location was amazing, right next to the beach.

Fantastic park with friendly, responsive staff. Great location, good amenities, usually quiet at night. My only advice is don't camp on the unpowered sites next to the lake near the camp kitchen if heavy rain is likely - the sites have no drainage and with the storm water draining from the road, the sites turn into swamps very quickly. We had a couple of cms of water sitting on our site as the ground was inundated. Hope park management can rectify this problem. It would also be great to have a 'no drone' policy for the park as this is the first year we've had to contend with regular drone annoyance.

Honestly one of the best parks I have ever stayed at! Fantastic location, staff are incredible and the park is well maintained. The only thing I would say is that the washing machines need to be cleaned properly / more regularly. When putting a load of washing on, I folded back the seal and it was full of mud, sand and fluff!

Back from our third stay at Reflections Eden. Another incredible experience. If you’re looking for a kid friendly holiday, look no further! We have a 6 & 9 year old who have had the time of their lives over the past couple of weeks. A constant rotation of bike riding, playground, pedal karts, beach, eat, repeat! As well as the amazing kid-friendly activities provided by the park, including craft mornings, movie nights, kareoke, face painting, temporary tattoos, colouring comps… the list goes on!!. Each day or night the park also had a different on-site food truck as an optional extra. Wood fired pizza, waffles, poffertjes, burgers. Which was great for something different when we couldn’t be bothered cooking!!.
Reflections Eden is Managed so wonderfully. The Owners are so friendly and welcoming as a family. Can’t fault our experience for the third year running. Thanks so much team!! We look forward to next time!
Very good

Great place to stay
December 2024
Lovely well appointed cabin in a great park. Loved the coffee machine, made it feel like home. Morning sun on the balcony was nice to sit and have brekky.  Close to a beautiful beach (in walking distance) . Staff were very friendly. Food vans came to park which was handy.

Ein wunderschöner Campingplatz, unter alten Bäumen mit vielen Vögeln fühlt man sich fast wie in einem botanischen Garten. Wir waren kurz vor Weihnachten dort, alles war liebevoll geschmückt. Schöne und saubere Waschräume, vollständig eingerichtete Campingküche. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt, der Ort macht seinem Namen Ehre.
Very helpfull staff. Clean amenities.

Amazing holiday park surrounded by a beautiful lake and right across the road from the beach. All staff at the park were extremely friendly and helpful. It was safe for the kids to ride their bikes around. There's a playground at the park but also one that is walking distance.

Great Stay, close to beach and lake. Very
clean and tidy park. Super friendly staff. Ground was very hard and dry, lost alot of pegs after being bent. Lol. Amenities very clean and user friendly. Enjoyed our stay.

Fabulous location right opposite the beach where we swam every morning. Campsite chosen was on the lagoon, protected from the wind. Showers just a little tired but clean and super hot with great pressure. Great boardwalk that went 95% around the lagoon and enjoyed riding our bikes. Will definitely return!

Beautiful park beautiful management and team Reflection Eden. Highly recommend to stay a few nights in a cabin or on a powered or unpowered site. Definitely go on there web site via google maps. Thankyou for a beautiful stay with my furbabies they loved it. 👍👏🐾🦋💯🥂

Dog-friendly holiday park (on lead when in the park) with unpowered camps right on the lake out the back so you can see the fish jumping around and some great bird life - sea eagles and black swans. Toilets and showers are modern and well-maintained. Several camp kitchens with bbqs, stovetops and fridge. Friendly and helpful staff. Even have a dog washing facility and its just over the road from Aslings Beach so highly recommend for anyone travelling with dogs to stay here.
Just getting beyond a joke, minimum stay 7 days over Australia Day weekend! This park has a minimum stay requirement of 7 nights during your stay.
nice older style van park. onsuite for van is pure luxury
Good size sites. We often have trouble with site sizes with our 21ft caravan. Lovely green grass and good clean facilities. All good. Jim

Booked via email and was not provided with the hidden terms which included it being non refundable. Despite cancelling more than 90 days out was refused a credit or refund. Will never stay at a Reflections park again
A large park which is very well set out.  Large grassy sites, spotless amenities in a great location.  They even have a dog wash!  We have no hesitation in returning here next time.
Great camp.  Clean and well looked after

Beautiful park, cabins are very well set out and very clean.wonderful service and very friendly.Great to be able to bring the dogs with a deck that is safe for the dogs to be able to sit outside.Pefect location to relax.Thankyou.
Lady who booked us in was very efficient. Our sight was good and amenities work fine. Dump point on site and is pet friendly. Easy walk into town.

The most beautiful caravan park
Surrounded by gorgeous lake views and the sounds of the ocean right across the road.

Super friendly, professional and easy going care takers. Will definitely be returning and recommending Reflections Eden to our family and friends

Great park, great location and great customer service. Simon the manager was more then helpful and welcoming pointing us in the right directions for some stuff we needed on our travels.
The park was nice and flat so great for caravans and camping the only thing I could suggest is to sell the chemical for RV / Caravan toilets however after using the amenities they were always clean. We will be back for sure 100%

In our Camper Trailer and the best park between the beach and the lake.
Facilities are clean and modern.
Even have the bathroom heated for when you have your shower.
They also have Ensuites for Caravans if wanted.
Love the location next to the lagoon boardwalk and just over the road is the beach so waves heard throughout our stay, so relaxing

Really hate to do this, but it has to be said!
Stayed at eden and Bermagui reflections in deluxe cabins over two nights back to back and both parks have outdated televisions in the bedrooms, can’t even pick up all free to air channels, c,mon guys it’s 2024 We have smart tv’s now and there not that expensive, otherwise a great place to stay

Big sites
Great park
Very helpful staff

Absolutely loved the ensuite powered site here.
A pleasure to stay here, with lovely surrounds and friendly staff.

My family and I stayed here for 4 nights and thoroughly enjoyed it.

Service was incredible from start to finish, well maintained facilities and grounds - which is quite spacious, and the location is amazing.

We will definitely be back.

It was walking distance to the beach. About 25 minutes walk to the main street. The accommodation was pretty good for the price and was dog friendly too. I would advise that while it could sleep 6 people, it would be better for 4 at max as the bunk room is small and very little storage. There was a catering truck on site on the first night which was convenient.
We spent 4 days there and it was the best camping place that we have had so far. Lots of space for kids to ride their bikes and a stone's throw from the beach.
Great place with the family, Eden is beautiful.

We spent four nights at the Reflections Eden and were really happy!

The caravan park itself is spacious and well maintained.  Staff were friendly and helpful.  Caravan sites were large and spacious, a real benefit as we have a larger caravan and car!

Eden itself is a lovely little town. A great feature of Reflections Eden is that it located just opposite a large beach with great walking track right outside the front gate!

One other awesome feature is a car / van wash bay and dog washing facilities.

We would happily come back again, we really enjoyed this one!

We ended up at Reflections Holiday Park Eden after car troubles. We managed to get a site a week out from the Easter weekend. The staff understood our situation and couldn’t have been more helpful, even managing some bookings so we could stay a bit longer on that site. With no car we did lots of walking and a bit of bike riding. In any circumstance this is a really nice park with good facilities and in a great location. And did I mention management and the staff are fabulous! We would happily stay here again.

Stayed with 2 other families, 2 vans 1 cabin. What a great time over Easter weekend.
Staff communication each day by text about children activities was excellent. Food vans attended each night too!
Very busy but very quiet considering.
And of course the beach is across the road and it was fabulous. The kids loved the small surf and plenty of safe water.
Thanks To the staff again!!

Lovely park in a premium location, right across from the beach and right on a lake.
Dog friendly. Level large sites.
A little bit out of town we rode our bikes in of the great bike trailer for  coffee.
Also there is an amazing board walk around the lake accessible from the campground.
Great park,great beach,great walks,great little town.

If you're after a beach to go fishing and swimming at or a lake to just sit back and relax. This park has both. And we were lucky enough to be there on the Friday and they had a food truck with really delicious food. The park and the amenities were kept clean. We would definitely stay here again.

Stayed on caravan powered site. Perfectly flat, grassy site much appreciated after recent disappointments elsewhere.
At the time we were there other dog owners obeyed standard park rules regarding "on-leash" requirements, thank you to those.
Lana, in reception helpful & professional in her job, well done.
Great location adjacent Asling beach. Would recommend Eden Holiday Park & we will be back.
A great dog friendly park close to the beach. Good facilities, including ensuite caravan sites
Great park across from an off leisurely dog beach.  Park even has a dog wash
Friendly staff, clean amenities, and large, un-powered sites. I'd happily return.
Waren nur 1 Nacht hier , wunderschöner Platz , alles super sauber , Freundlichkeit ohne Ende

This is a well managed caravan park. The staff are excellent and the manager is really helpful and friendly. We camped here for 10 days with our family and have no complaints. The unpowered sites are grassy and next to the lake. The facilities are very well maintained. The location is really good next to the lake and the beach.

It’s a tough comparison when I stayed here right after the Eco-camp at Tathra, so I can’t really give this holiday park 5 stars.  Still, it was a lovely place to stay, and I enjoyed my time here.

Everything was clean, and well-organised. The beach is just across the road, which is a big plus.  And they were upgrading their internet when I was there, so I believe there will soon be broadband WiFi throughout the park.  (Check with them to confirm this though.)

I stayed in one of the cabins, which was fabulously practical and comfortable.  I’d describe it as utilitarian (does the job well).
Was worth the extra $$ over camping to have my own air con and bathroom.

There are no real reasons I wouldn’t stay here again, but also nothing I really loved drawing me back.  If you’re looking for a nice place to stay in Eden, it does the job well.  I would happily stay here again.

The sites are nice and flat
Staff are great.
Toilets are old but well maintained.
Close to Lake and Dog Beach.
A bit out of town if you like that.
Would definitely stay here again.
No swimming pool

Beautiful and peaceful spot next to the free flowing lake/lagoon. Beach is walking distance and pristine, not as nice as Pambula or some other beaches but still great. Dog friendly, some of the best amenities I’ve experienced and friendly staff.

I liked their professionalism and the way they handle their customers in a nice manner. Thanks for solving my car park issue. Recommend place to go, awesome location, nice amenities

Below my kids comments

I liked how they weren’t that strict and slowly read the instructions to make sure their customers understood. Their service was awesome! They were nice to me and didn’t care about my appearance. I would recommend going to this place because you get to take mesmerising photos.

I loved the location where we set our tent which was a nice place near a lake.the entertainment is definitely ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️,it included movies ,playgrounds ,bikes,it was awesome.The only concern is the pets that are set loose,there are let go in food areas and not nice running around the park when people could be scared or allergic.just make sure dogs don’t go too far from the tent.

A must stay
Clean neat and friendly
Great beach out front and water inlet/lake beside the park
We stay caravan power ensuit site Everything is easy

We had a ensuite site with a view of the lake
An amazing park

We stay in the pet friendly cabins. 2nd visit. Clean, comfortable, outside secure deck. Short walk to great dog friendly beach. Recommended to friends with caravan who also enjoyed their stay. Good spot.
Stayed here for a couple of nights back in 2021 & were very happy with the caravan park and our powered site. There's a lovely lagoon behind the park too.

Best located holiday park/ camping option in Eden. As it is on the edge of the inlet and across the road from the lovely beach. One can access the walkway around the inlet from the caravan park and if it is low tide you can cross the inlet entry and do the complete Circuit. Staff where amazing, we did have an issue which they listened to and quickly sorted. I would ask for one of the newer rooms as the older ones are on the renovation plan not done as yet

A very nice holiday park in a peaceful environment and a friendly girl at the reception. We had an unpowered site, very good size, right at the lake and it was super relaxing. We had a plan to go to town but we stayed at our site and we were watching birds instead. Clean amenities and what was surprising, they even have a special bath for dogs! The WiFi didn't work, when we were there, but we didn't need it

One of the very nicest parks we have been to.  An excellent variety of good sized, flat, grassed sites whether powered with or without ensuite or unpowered.  (lots of cabins too)  Excellent amenities, helpful and friendly staff and everything just feels really well looked after.  But the best bit is the location - well away from the highway with a lake on one side and beach on the other which gives plenty of walk/ride options.  Quiet at night too.  Lots to see and do in the area - more than we had time for in 4 days so I guess we'll have to come back.

Very helpful kind people who run it.  Fantastic bath for the dog.  Great location between the lake and the ocean with east access right across the road to a nice quiet beach.  Facilities neat and clean.  Nice playground for the children. Thanks!
Owner very good with our need as in a site. Good location to town very happy

Great place to stay.  Beach one side, lake the other, so choice to suit everyone. Dog friendly park. Host very obliging, helpful and lights the communal fire every night. Amenities are heated in winter 10/10. Will return for a longer stay next time!
Lovely park, great amenities and friendly staff
We ALWAYS park our caravan here every time we visit Eden. Facilities and location is great🩷

Fantastic location, close to town & across from the beach.
Well maintained surrounds on the shores of the tidal lake.
Spacious cabins clean & tidy.

We stayed here for two nights at a powered site in winter and it was just beautiful, quiet and sheltered, the camp kitchen had everything we needed, great playground for the kids and safe tracks for riding bikes around. Walking tracks from the park straight to the beach across the road or the boardwalk around the lake. Shower block was heated with a split system which was a nice touch. The family room only had two baths and no showers but that was ok for the kids. Wifi didn't reach around the park, a booster at the camp kitchen might improve reach
This is a camp and caravan park. Quiet beautiful close to beach and lagoon. Loved the fire set for us for the evening which helped us meet the other campers.
Great spot,  units are nice but showing some signs of age. Park management were nice and service was ok.
